comment: Hand-written notification content for the simulated notifications tab. Every identity here is FICTIONAL — invented handles, no real people. Reply templates use {name} for the target's first name and {handle} for their @handle. Tone keys map to fake-replier archetypes in lib/notifications.ts. Keep it mean-but-harmless: no slurs, no threats, nothing explicit.
